source_book: The 4 Disciplines of Execution (2nd ed., 2021) — Chris McChesney, Sean Covey, Jim Huling, Scott Thele, Beverly Walker
_comment: Member-voice prep BEFORE walking into a team WIG Session. Lures cover leader-misfire (session-lead), personal-misfire (solo session), and cross-member misfire (debrief vs prep, backward vs forward). Edge case = unknown lead measure (fire AND route back to comprehension).

test_cases.prompt: Help me prep my commitment for next WIG Session — it's tomorrow morning and I want to walk in with something specific instead of improvising.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d4-member-commitment-prep; run the 6-step prep flow starting with the lead-measure gate, generate 1-3 candidates, apply the five filters (specific / lead-moving / control / self-chosen / scope), rehearse the verbatim wording.
test_cases.notes: positive scenario: classic pre-session prep (member voice, EN)

test_cases.prompt: 明日のチームの WIG Session に向けて、今週のコミットメントを準備したいです。前回曖昧で詰められたので、今度はちゃんとしたものを言いたい。
test_cases.expected_behavior: 4dx-d4-member-commitment-prep を発動。lead measure ゲート → 先週の振り返り → candidate 出し → 5 フィルター → verbatim リハーサル。曖昧コンプライアンス・依存・whirlwind を排除する。
test_cases.notes: positive scenario: JP member-voice, post-vague-feedback re-prep

test_cases.prompt: 下次 WIG session 我想為這週的 commitment 先想清楚再去開會，不要再臨場亂講「我會努力」之類的。
test_cases.expected_behavior: 啟動 4dx-d4-member-commitment-prep；走六步：確認 lead measure → 回顧上週 → 列出候選 → 跑五道篩 → 演練逐字版本 → 交班至 session。拒絕 compliance / 依賴他人 / whirlwind 偽裝。
test_cases.notes: positive scenario: zh-TW member-voice, anti-compliance-commitment intent

test_cases.prompt: I'm the leader running tomorrow's team WIG Session. Help me facilitate the meeting — what's the agenda, how do I push back when commitments are vague?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate this skill. The user is facilitating (leader-side), not preparing their own commitment to walk in with. Route to the team-wig-session-lead skill.
test_cases.notes: lure: leader-misfire — 'WIG Session' keyword present but leader facilitation, not member prep

test_cases.prompt: Help me run my solo weekly review. I'm working on my personal WIG alone, no team involved.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate this skill. The user has no team session to walk into. Route to 4dx-d4-personal-wig-session.
test_cases.notes: lure: personal-misfire — 'commitment' / 'weekly' keywords but solo cadence, not team-session prep

test_cases.prompt: I missed my commitment last week. WIG Session is tomorrow — help me figure out what to say about what happened.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate this skill. The user is in BACKWARD-facing reflection mode (account for last week), not FORWARD-facing prep mode. Route to 4dx-d4-member-account-debrief.
test_cases.notes: lure: cross-member misfire — same member voice + same session boundary, but past-commitment debrief, not next-commitment prep

test_cases.prompt: I have a WIG Session this Friday and I want to prep my commitment. Honestly though I'm not even sure what our team's lead measure is — I think it might be something about pipeline volume? Help me prep anyway.
test_cases.expected_behavior: DO fire 4dx-d4-member-commitment-prep (the trigger language is unambiguous), AND immediately hit the step-1 hard gate: the member can't name the lead measure verbatim. Halt prep and route to 4dx-d1-member-team-wig-comprehension first. Explain why — prepping a commitment against an unknown lead produces theatre, not real prep. Offer to resume prep once comprehension is closed.
test_cases.notes: boundary: skill correctly fires on trigger but the in-skill hard gate routes back upstream — fire AND defer, not fire AND fake-prep.

ship_threshold_note: 100% to ship cleanly. >=80% allowed only with explicit failure analysis. <80% must redo Stage 2 A2/E/B. should_not_trigger has zero tolerance.
